note: Added sort.Slice(panel, func(i, j int) bool { return panel[i].ID < panel[j].ID }) at the end of the default-panel branch in resolvePanel (config.go:172). The glob-path sort at line 102 includes the .md suffix, so alice-pro.md sorts before alice.md because '-' (0x2D) < '.' (0x2E), inverting the required ID order. The explicit sort by p.ID corrects this without touching the filename sort (which the lexicographic persona-file loading order depends on). Also updated the stale comment from 'sorted by filename=ID' to 'sorted by persona ID'.
